metadata.title: review-alignment
metadata.description: Review available analysis and design artifacts for consistency, traceability, completeness, and implementation readiness.

command.goal:
Review available analysis and design artifacts for consistency, traceability, completeness, and implementation readiness.
## Usage
/review-alignment <artifact> [<artifact> ...]
## Accepted Inputs
- Issue or user story - Approved design - ADRs and diagrams - Implementation plan - OpenSpec proposal, design, specifications, and tasks - Any partial combination of these artifacts
## Owning Agent
@robot-business-analyst
## Associated Capabilities
- Requirement and acceptance-criteria traceability - Plan and OpenSpec consistency review - ADR and design alignment review - Readiness assessment

step.step-content: Inventory provided artifacts and identify authority.
Trace requirements, decisions, planned work, and verification.
Rank findings by severity and report readiness.

safeguards-list.safeguards-item: Accept partial artifact sets without requiring every type.
